subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the heart that hath turned, and the face that hath inclined, and the eye that hath beheld, and the ear that hath hearkened, when the Call was raised from the Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لقلب اقبل و لوجه توجه و لعین رات و لاذن سمعت اذ ارتفع الندآء من السدره
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
